title: Harry Potter and the Chamber of Secrets
author: JK Rowling
prompt:
Question: Which of the following passages is verbatim from the "Harry Potter and the Chamber of Secrets" book by JK Rowling?
Options:
A. When he’d found his scarlet team robes and pulled on his cloak for warmth, Harry scribbled a note to Ron explaining where he’d gone and went down the spiral staircase to the common room, his Nimbus Two Thousand on his shoulder. He had just reached the portrait hole when there was a clatter behind him and Colin Creevey came dashing down the spiral staircase, his camera swinging madly around his neck and something clutched in his hand. 
B. After locating his bright red team outfits and throwing on his cloak for warmth, Harry quickly wrote a note to Ron saying where he was going and descended the spiral staircase to the common room, his Nimbus Two Thousand broom over his shoulder. He had just reached the portrait exit when there was a loud noise behind him and Colin Creevey came rushing down the spiral staircase, his camera swinging wildly around his neck and grasping something in his hand.
C. After locating his bright red team robes and throwing on his cloak to stay warm, Harry jotted down a quick note to Ron clarifying where he was headed and descended the spiral steps to the common room, his Nimbus Two Thousand broomstick over his shoulder. He had just made it to the portrait entrance when there was a commotion behind him and Colin Creevey came rushing down the spiral steps, his camera flailing wildly around his neck and grasping something in his hand.
D. When Harry had found his vivid scarlet team uniforms and put on his cloak for heat, he scribbled a message to Ron explaining where he had gone and went down the spiral staircase to the common room, his Nimbus Two Thousand broom on his shoulder. He had just gotten to the portrait hole when there was a crash behind him and Colin Creevey came hurrying down the spiral staircase, his camera swinging crazily around his neck and clutching something in his hand.  
Answer:

options.A: When he’d found his scarlet team robes and pulled on his cloak for warmth, Harry scribbled a note to Ron explaining where he’d gone and went down the spiral staircase to the common room, his Nimbus Two Thousand on his shoulder. He had just reached the portrait hole when there was a clatter behind him and Colin Creevey came dashing down the spiral staircase, his camera swinging madly around his neck and something clutched in his hand.
options.B: After locating his bright red team outfits and throwing on his cloak for warmth, Harry quickly wrote a note to Ron saying where he was going and descended the spiral staircase to the common room, his Nimbus Two Thousand broom over his shoulder. He had just reached the portrait exit when there was a loud noise behind him and Colin Creevey came rushing down the spiral staircase, his camera swinging wildly around his neck and grasping something in his hand.
options.C: After locating his bright red team robes and throwing on his cloak to stay warm, Harry jotted down a quick note to Ron clarifying where he was headed and descended the spiral steps to the common room, his Nimbus Two Thousand broomstick over his shoulder. He had just made it to the portrait entrance when there was a commotion behind him and Colin Creevey came rushing down the spiral steps, his camera flailing wildly around his neck and grasping something in his hand.
options.D: When Harry had found his vivid scarlet team uniforms and put on his cloak for heat, he scribbled a message to Ron explaining where he had gone and went down the spiral staircase to the common room, his Nimbus Two Thousand broom on his shoulder. He had just gotten to the portrait hole when there was a crash behind him and Colin Creevey came hurrying down the spiral staircase, his camera swinging crazily around his neck and clutching something in his hand.
